SUMMARY 
Applied AI Engineer with hands-on experience building and deploying Python-based ML and LLM systems used in 
real-world workflows. Strong background across the full AI lifecycle, including data pipeline design, model training and 
evaluation, API-backed services, and deployment-ready ML systems. Experienced with Retrieval-Augmented

evaluation, API-backed services, and deployment-ready ML systems. Experienced with Retrieval-Augmented 
Generation, agentic LLM workflows, and cloud-based experimentation. Comfortable working directly with stakeholders 
and taking ownership of end-to-end AI solutions from problem definition to customer success.
